visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman stands in a brightly lit warehouse aisle. She is wearing a white bucket hat with a small logo, a white ribbed turtleneck, and light-blue jeans with distressing on the knees. She gestures animatedly with her hands as she speaks to the camera. The background consists of tall industrial shelving packed with large cardboard boxes and appliances like refrigerators. (2) The scene cuts to a close-up of a product display for a Bose Soundbar. A white placard details the product specifications in black text. Below the placard, the soundbar and its subwoofer are displayed on a white platform. (3) The woman is back in frame, standing next to the product display. She points towards the price tag and the boxes stacked behind her. Her facial expression is one of high energy and excitement. (4) The camera pans across a stack of white Bose product boxes. A second person's arm reaches into the frame to touch one of the boxes, indicating interest in the item. (5) The woman stands in the aisle, looking directly at the camera with wide eyes and an open mouth in a surprised expression. She then smiles broadly and places both hands on her hips in a confident pose as the camera holds on her briefly before the end.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 大家搶著買. [Variety]: 黑五好康. [Variety]: BOSE 聲霸. [Variety]: 狂降 8000 元. (2) [Subtitle]: 大家都在買這個. (3) [Subtitle]: 黑五最殺 29,999. (4) [Subtitle]: 直接省了 8000. (5) [Subtitle]: BOSE 的 Soundbar. (6) [Slogan]: 家庭娛樂揚聲器 550 + 無線低音箱 500. [Logo]: BOSE. (7) [Subtitle]: 他這樣子只要 21,999. (8) [Subtitle]: 你知道打了幾折嗎? (9) [Subtitle]: 七折 將近七折. (10) [Subtitle]: 哇 你看. (11) [Subtitle]: 我們現場也只剩下九組了. (12) [Subtitle]: 快要被拿空了. (13) [Subtitle]: 原本還滿滿的. (14) [Subtitle]: 好恐怖喔. (15) [Subtitle]: 有需要 Soundbar 的人真的可以考慮. (16) [Subtitle]: 因為七折這優惠真的是有夠殺. (17) [Subtitle]: 我也想要一台. (18) [Subtitle]: 可以喔 音質超好的. (19) [Subtitle]: 但我今天沒帶那麼多錢. (20) [Subtitle]: 呃...

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 person behind the camera speaking, and at least 1 other shopper visible in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman wearing a white New York Yankees bucket hat, a white long-sleeved ribbed turtleneck shirt, and distressed light-blue denim jeans.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An industrial warehouse interior featuring high-reaching metal shelves stocked with cardboard boxes, kitchen appliances like refrigerators, and promotional signage.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, high-arousal female voice begins speaking with a joyful tone. High-energy electronic BGM with a strong kick drum starts immediately. (2) A synthetic 'Whoosh' transition SFX marks a cut. Vocal continues at a rapid rate. (3) Another 'Whoosh' sound effect triggers as the speaker highlights a brand name. (4) A comedic 'Wow' SFX is played, followed by audible light laughter from another person off-camera. (5) A sharp 'Ding' SFX punctuates the mention of a percentage discount. (6) Another 'Ding' SFX occurs as the speaker gestures to the stock levels. (7) A final high-pitched 'Ding' and a brief pause in speech before the track cuts out.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Evidence -> Social Proof -> Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to drive immediate sales for a Bose Soundbar system by highlighting a significant Black Friday discount at Costco. It uses a high-energy delivery, visible product evidence, and a sense of scarcity ('only 9 sets left') to appeal to bargain-hunting consumers.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator specifically names the product, mentions the retailer (Costco), shows the product display and price, and directly recommends purchasing it.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively utilizes social media editing trends, such as high-density text overlays and reaction sound effects, to maintain viewer engagement and convey product value rapidly.
